resolution_strategies.resolution_strategy_id: Unique identifier of the resolution strategy.

compliance_degree.reason: Explanation of why this compliance degree was assigned.

resolution_context_consistency.reason: Explanation of why this consistency level was assigned.

change_cost.reason: Explanation of why this cost level was assigned.

structural_quality_impact.reason: Explanation of how the strategy affects process structure.

change_location.reason: Explanation of why this location category was assigned.

best_resolution_strategy_id: Identifier of the recommended resolution strategy.
best_resolution_reason: Explanation of why the strategy was selected as the best option.
